news.headline: TVCMALL at CES 2025 with 4,000 exhibitors showcasing AI, digital health, and mobility innovations.
news.summary: In Las Vegas on January 11, 2025, the renowned tech event CES 2025 wrapped up, featuring more than 4,000 exhibitors unveiling innovations in AI, digital health, and mobility. Among them was TVCMALL, a prominent B2B wholesaler, participating for the second year in a row.

news.headline: UK and China to explore Wealth Connect program: Statement
China to Launch First Sustainable Government Bond in London in 2025
Famous NFL player's wife, Allison Kucharczyk, overshadows his career by sharing her life with fans, gaining massive popularity.
news.summary: Allison Kucharczyk has gained more attention than her journeyman athlete husband by sharing the highs and lows of her lifestyle.

news.headline: Celebrities flock to Bucks County, PA as luxury inns rise, rivaling Hamptons. Hadids, Bradley Cooper among visitors.
news.summary: Following the footsteps of celebrities like the Hadids and Bradley Cooper, the New Hope, Pa., area has seen a surge in the construction of upscale inns. This development has transformed the region into a notable competitor to the Hamptons, drawing attention as a luxurious destination.

news.headline: GOP and Trump futile in halting EVs, experts say. Rising sales as tech improves; 70%+ believe buyers will go electric even sans incentives.
news.summary: With the ongoing advancements in technology and declining prices, it is anticipated that an increasing number of car buyers will opt for battery-powered vehicles. This trend is projected to continue even if the incentives introduced during the Biden administration are no longer available.

news.headline: Delta's profits surge, airlines optimistic for 2025 with high ticket demand. Industry wary of recession or inflation risks.
news.summary: The sector is currently experiencing high ticket demand and increased profits. However, there is concern about susceptibility to unforeseen issues such as economic downturns or spikes in inflation.

news.headline: Reeves announces: UK to earn £600m from 5-year agreements with China
Rachel Reeves, UK Chancellor, addresses audience in Beijing
Protocol activates revenue-sharing plan post USD0++ depeg, aimed to stabilize ecosystem after departing $1 peg.
news.summary: To enhance the stability of its ecosystem, Usual Protocol has implemented a revenue-sharing model after its currency was depegged from the US dollar at a rate of 1:USD0++. The new model is aimed at ensuring a more sustainable financial framework within the ecosystem.

news.headline: Kelun-Biotech signs exclusive license agreement with Harbour BioMed for SKB378/HBM9378, an anti-TSLP mAb.
news.summary: A recent announcement from Sichuan Kelun-Biotech Biopharmaceutical Co., Ltd. in Chengdu, China, on Jan. 11, 2025, revealed a significant development. The Company disclosed that they have inked an exclusive license agreement with HBM Holdings Limited, also known as Harbour BioMed. This agreement will see both entities, collectively referred to as the Licensors, collaborating on certain ventures. This strategic partnership is expected to have a notable impact on the biopharmaceutical sector, with details about the collaboration being eagerly anticipated.

news.headline: Celebrity driving instructor spends 8 hrs teaching in NYC, then has dinner with son. Each day starts with coffee.
news.summary: Shanti Gooljar starts her day with a cup of coffee before embarking on eight hours of intense driving lessons in New York City. She wraps up her day by sharing dinner with her son.

news.headline: Kia America donates $250,000 to American Red Cross for Los Angeles wildfire relief, impacting headquarters and region.
news.summary: Kia America's Headquarters in Southern California and surrounding areas are experiencing the effects of the recent wildfires. Kia America has pledged a generous contribution of $250,000 to support relief efforts, with all donations directed to the American Red Cross. This financial aid aims to assist individuals impacted by the wildfires in Los Angeles and offer support to those in need.

news.headline: Economist predicts Bitcoin supercycle due to spot ETF approval in 2024, despite current 13% dip from ATH.
news.summary: Economist and trader Alex Kruger has a positive outlook on Bitcoin, even though it is trading 13% below its peak. Kruger believes Bitcoin still has room for growth and is not at the peak of its cycle. He attributes this optimism to the approval of spot Bitcoin ETFs in January 2024, which he thinks could change the traditional halving cycles. Kruger mentioned on a podcast that the ETF approval and the increased flows they bring could make the relationship between risk and Bitcoin more sustainable. He noted that market conditions are changing, with the impact of halving decreasing and the introduction of ETFs. However, he warned that a supercycle does not guarantee continuous upward movement in Bitcoin's price.

news.headline: Dow Jones Futures drop, led by Nvidia; Meta signals buy, Tesla holds key level. Take action in bearish market.
news.summary: Keep an eye on the market's negative trend, particularly driven by Nvidia, despite buy signals from Meta and a few other stocks. Tesla maintained a crucial level. Dow Jones Futures indicate significant losses in the stock market. Investors are advised to stay vigilant.

news.headline: Bitcoin trader cautions on heightened risk in crypto cycle, emphasizes caution. Analysts see high chance of Bitcoin recovery.
news.summary: Bitcoin expert Willy Woo suggests being cautious in the near future, but several other cryptocurrency analysts are optimistic about the potential reversal of Bitcoin's trend.

news.headline: Neuralink, founded by Musk, completes third brain implant with new device.
Self-help guru, James Arthur Ray, 67, died after 3 people perished in an Arizona sweat lodge mishap at his retreat.
news.summary: A prominent figure in the world of motivational speaking was faced with a tragic event at one of his retreats in Arizona. The incident occurred during a sweat lodge ceremony and resulted in the deaths of three individuals. Though he had been gaining popularity as a New Age speaker, this disaster brought negative attention to his work.

news.headline: Over 99% of Pump.fun traders haven't secured profits exceeding $10K, according to data. Onchain analyst challenges these findings.
news.summary: According to data from Dune, the majority of traders on Pump.fun have not made a profit exceeding $10,000. However, an onchain analyst believes that this information does not provide a complete picture of the situation.

news.headline: Optimal Satcom surpasses 100 enterprise customers in 2024, showcasing growth and innovation in satellite capacity management.
news.summary: In Herndon, Virginia, Optimal Satcom, Inc., a prominent provider of satellite capacity management solutions, recently revealed that it has exceeded 100 enterprise clients in 2024. This achievement highlights the company's ongoing expansion, creativity, and position as a top player in the industry. Among its diverse clientele are the U.S. Government, allied governments, satellite operators, service providers, and various key sectors like enterprise, maritime, and in-flight connectivity.

news.headline: CES 2025: Global tech event in Las Vegas drew 141,000 attendees, 4500 exhibitors (1400 startups).
news.summary: At CES® 2025 in Las Vegas on January 10, 2025, over 141,000 attendees from across the world gathered at the premier tech event. The event featured over 4,500 exhibitors, including 1,400 startups, showcasing the latest innovations where technology and humanity intersect to unveil extraordinary possibilities.

news.headline: Daiso to open first store in Missouri at Wentzville on January 25th, 2025. Store to be located at Wentzville Crossings.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Daiso, a well-known retail chain known for its budget-friendly and distinct products, revealed the exciting news of the opening of its inaugural store in Missouri. The grand opening of the store will take place on January 25th at Wentzville Crossings. The location will be at 1905...

news.headline: ShopProp provides free home buying & renting services to those displaced by LA fire, calling on industry support. Offer available until January end.
news.summary: A company in Los Angeles has pledged to help families affected by the recent fire by providing free home buying and renting services. ShopProp is encouraging other real estate agents and industry professionals to also assist in this effort. The initiative will be available until the end of January or until resources are exhausted. ShopProp aims to support those impacted by the fire in finding housing solutions during this challenging time.

news.headline: Reeves: Global Financial Markets Have Undoubtedly Moved
Reeves on Fiscal Rules in Response to Question on Markets
UK's Reeves: Fiscal Rules Set in October Budget Are "Non-Negotiable"
Hawaiian Telcom and government leaders launch $1.7 billion investment for Hawai‘i to become the first fully fiber-enabled state by 2026.
news.summary: In Honolulu, Hawaiian Telcom unveiled a groundbreaking project in partnership with federal, state, and county authorities to establish Hawai‘i as the inaugural state with comprehensive fiber optic capability by 2026. This ambitious endeavor entails a monumental $1.7 billion commitment to cater to the progressing technology demands of residents and enterprises statewide. By commencing its fiber optic network expansion more than ten years ago, Hawaiian Telcom is spearheading this initiative toward ensuring Hawaiʻi continues to lead in broadband advancements.

news.headline: BMO donates to two organizations aiding LA wildfire relief efforts, expanding its support to affected communities.
news.summary: In Chicago on January 10, 2025, BMO declared its commitment to aiding individuals and communities impacted by the Los Angeles wildfires by contributing to two organizations actively involved in providing assistance. The support offered is supplementary to BMO's existing yearly contributions to philanthropic causes.

news.headline: Jesta I.S. releases Vision Suite Software V25 for retail & supply chain management in apparel, footwear, hard goods industries.
news.summary: Jesta I.S. has recently launched Version 25 of its Vision Supply Chain & Retail Management Suites catered towards the apparel, footwear, and hard goods sectors. This update introduces new features and enhancements to improve efficiency and productivity for businesses within these industries.

news.headline: Nuvve Holding Corp. urging stockholders to vote in Special Meeting on Jan 13, 2025, with record date of Dec 6, 2024.
news.summary: Nuvve Holding Corp. (NVVE) has announced that its shareholders are encouraged to participate in the upcoming Special Meeting of Stockholders on January 13, 2025, at 1:00 p.m. Eastern Time (10:00 a.m. Pacific Time). The details on how to vote and submit proxies can be found in the proxy materials distributed for the Special Meeting. The record date for the meeting is December 6, 2024. Shareholders requiring assistance with the voting process can seek help through provided channels.

news.headline: BioVaxys closes third tranche of private placement. CSE: BIOV, FRA: 5LB. (Jan. 10, 2025).
news.summary: Vancouver-based BioVaxys Technology Corp. (CSE: BIOV) (FRA: 5LB) has successfully completed the third tranche transaction as of January 10, 2025. The Company expressed satisfaction with this development.

news.headline: Co-founder of Wolf Capital admits to $9.4M Ponzi scheme, attracting 2,800 investors with 547% returns. US DOJ involved.
news.summary: The co-founder of Wolf Capital has confessed to participating in a wire fraud conspiracy, as per the US Department of Justice. Reports indicate that the individual admitted to deceiving around 2,800 cryptocurrency investors into a Ponzi scheme.

news.headline: CU SoCal donates $1.25M in interest-free loans + $10K, along with team support, for wildfire relief in SoCal. #CUSoCal#WildfireRelief
news.summary: In Anaheim Hills, California on January 10, 2025, the Credit Union of Southern California (CU SoCal) is providing support to individuals impacted by the severe wildfires in Southern California. As part of their commitment to Building Better Lives, CU SoCal has announced a pledge to offer assistance.

news.headline: Check out Bloomberg's Balance of Power on 01/10/25 for key insights and analysis. #news #finance
Northfield Capital (TSX-V: NFD.A) to start normal course issuer bid on TSX Venture Exchange as announced on Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Northfield Capital Corporation (TSX-V: NFD.A) revealed plans to initiate a normal course issuer bid on the TSX Venture Exchange.

news.headline: Canary Cure Therapeutics developed siRNA therapy for obesity, showing significant fat loss and muscle preservation.
news.summary: A cutting-edge siRNA therapeutic showcased substantial fat loss and impressive preservation of lean body mass, offering enhanced adherence. Canary Cure Therapeutics, a leader in developing advanced RNA therapeutics, revealed this groundbreaking news in New York on Jan. 10, 2025. The novel therapy promises to deliver significant results with a noticeable reduction in fat mass and preservation of lean body mass, indicating its potential to revolutionize treatment approaches.

news.headline: CSX Corp. in Jacksonville, FL announces ratification of 5-year labor deal with BMWED by employees represented by Teamsters.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, on January 10, 2025, CSX Corporation (NASDAQ: CSX) revealed that workers belonging to The Brotherhood of Maintenance of Way Employes Division of the International Brotherhood of Teamsters (BMWED) have officially approved the five-year collective bargaining deal.

news.headline: Expected drop in mortgage rates reversed; rates are now on the rise.
North Dakota legislators to consider crypto reserve with increasing state Bitcoin treasuries, amid growing interest.
news.summary: Lawmakers in North Dakota are considering the idea of expanding their assets to include cryptocurrencies and precious metals. This decision comes after similar proposals in other states regarding Bitcoin.

news.headline: Zhean Bai convicted in deadly torture of Juliet the cat with help from Alley Cat Allies. Jan. 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Butler County, Pennsylvania, on January 10, 2025, Oxford resident Zhean Bai was found guilty of the fatal abuse of Juliet the cat. Alley Cat Allies, a prominent advocate for feline welfare worldwide, assisted the prosecution in a significant manner.

news.headline: Dow has worst year since 2016, as Fed rate-cut hopes for 2025 dwindle.
Global Uranium Corp extends marketing program through Euro Digital Media Ltd for 45 days, starting Jan 13, 2025.
news.summary: CALGARY, Alberta, January 10, 2025 - Global Uranium Corp. has extended its engagement with Euro Digital Media Ltd. for marketing services, as per their announcements on November 7, 2024, and December 17, 2024. The extension will last for 45 days starting January 13, 2025, or until the budget is depleted. The Company, listed as CSE: GURN | OTC: GURFF | FRA: Q3J, may further extend or shorten the marketing services period as deemed necessary. Euro Digital Media Ltd. can be contacted at 71-75 Shelton Street, Covent Garden, London, UK, WC2H 9JQ, or via email at info@eurodigitalmedia.co.uk.

news.headline: HYTN receives initial order under SNDL partnership, expanding presence in UK, Germany, Australia. (chars: 94)
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on January 10, 2025, HYTN Innovations Inc. disclosed that they have received an initial purchase order from SNDL Inc., a leading cannabis corporation. This transaction is part of their manufacturing and pricing agreements and signifies HYTN's focus on pharmaceutical-grade cannabis production. The company, listed as CSE: HYTN, FSE: 85W0, OTC PINK: HYTNF, is emphasizing its dedication to growing in regulated global markets such as the UK, Germany, and Australia. SNDL Inc., listed on the NASDAQ as SNDL, is recognized as one of the largest vertically integrated cannabis entities worldwide.

news.headline: Pacific Office Automation appoints Adam Pritchett as CEO, after 21 years with the company.
news.summary: A significant announcement was made by Pacific Office Automation (POA) based in Beaverton, Oregon, as they named Adam Pritchett as the new Chief Executive Officer (CEO). Pritchett's appointment, effective immediately, was communicated to employees on January 2nd, with plans to inform customers through local staff. POA, recognized as the largest independent office equipment dealer in the U.S., highlighted Pritchett's 21-year tenure with the company. Pritchett, who had assumed an interim leadership role from October 1, 2024, is now officially appointed as the CEO.

news.headline: Resecurity partners with PICSPro to enhance cybersecurity in the Philippines, boosting education and support for professionals.
news.summary: A partnership has been formed between Resecurity and the Philippine Institute of Cyber Security Professionals (PICSPro) in Los Angeles. PICSPro is a non-profit working to secure cyberspace in the Philippines. The collaboration aims to boost cybersecurity education, offer specialized training, and assist cybersecurity professionals in their career growth in the region. Key representatives were present at the signing ceremony to mark this strategic alliance.

news.headline: Merger agreement between Mutual Federal Bancorp and Mutual Federal Bank terminated on Jan. 7, 2025.
news.summary: A merger agreement was signed on January 7, 2025 between Mutual Federal Bancorp, Inc. (OTC: MFDB), Mutual Federal Bank, and Mutual Federal Bancorp, MHC. Mutual Federal Bancorp, Inc. is the parent company of the federally-chartered savings association Mutual Federal Bank. The details of the merger were disclosed, signaling a significant development in the financial sector.

news.headline: CVS Health aids California wildfire response for customers, members, providers, and colleagues. Prioritizes health and safety.
news.summary: CVS Health® (NYSE: CVS) is currently providing significant assistance to customers, members, provider partners, and colleagues in response to the California wildfires. The company is focused on ensuring the well-being of affected communities and is committed to supporting them during this challenging time.

news.headline: Sempra and Sempra Foundation donate $1M for California fire relief. Sempra: $250k, Sempra Foundation: $750k.
news.summary: In San Diego on January 10, 2025, Sempra (NYSE: SRE) and Sempra Foundation disclosed plans to donate a total of $1 million to aid individuals affected by the California wildfires. The Sempra Foundation, established and wholly financed by Sempra, will contribute up to $750,000 for this cause.

news.headline: Ascend Wellness Holdings to issue $15 million of Senior Secured Notes through agency agreement.
news.summary: On January 10, 2025, Ascend Wellness Holdings, Inc. disclosed an agency agreement with Seaport Global Securities. Ascend, a prominent multi-state cannabis operator, also known as AWH, declared this partnership with the aim to boost its operations. The Company's stock is listed as CSE: AAWH-U.CN and OTCQX: AAWH.

news.headline: PitchBook in Seattle named as Best Workplace by Built In for 2025 in Large Company category, recognizing businesses with more than 1,000 employees based on company data, compensation, benefits, DEI programs.
news.summary: Seattle-based PitchBook, a leading data provider specializing in private and public equity markets, has been recognized as one of the Best Places to Work in 2025 by Built In. The prestigious accolade was awarded in the Large Company category, specifically for businesses in Seattle with over 1,000 employees. Built In's selection process utilizes an algorithm that considers company data related to compensation and benefits. Moreover, the recognition takes into account factors such as remote and flexible work options, diversity, equity, and inclusion programs.
